data.title: Watsco leans on ecommerce as Q2 sales dip 4%
data.description: Looking ahead, Watsco is developing a new digital platform called WatscoOne, set to launch next year.

data.title: Grainger reports strong Q2, driven by digital growth
data.description: Grainger credited its success to a continued focus on customer relationships, innovation, and its growing digital presence.

data.title: SiteOne grows digital sales 130% in Q2 despite weak construction demand
data.description: Customers who use the platform are buying more frequently and helping SiteOne expand its market share, according to SiteOne.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How eBay is using AI
data.description: For eBay, AI use cases included tasks for sellers and buyers, as well as its internal teams, with some results already public.

data.title: BigCommerce rebrands and shifts focus to AI-driven digital commerce
data.description: “This is not a cosmetic change,” said CEO Travis Hess. “We’re restructuring around the way commerce is actually working now — where AI platforms are influencing what people see and buy.”
